project: Solstice Signal (Tuning into the Dark) - MVP & Polish Map

releases.name: Release 2
releases.description: Audio & Visual Polish (High-quality Edge TTS & CRT VFX)

stories.name: Draw target sine wave
stories.description: Renders a steady green target wave indicating resonance target.

stories.name: Draw player modulated wave
stories.description: Renders player wave modulated by frequency, resonance, and phase sliders.

stories.name: Visual wave merge lock
stories.description: Fades waves together into a single bright line when calibration is within 2% margin.

stories.name: Frequency, Resonance, Phase Sliders
stories.description: Three HTML range sliders to adjust signal calibration values.

stories.name: Cyberpunk slider styling
stories.description: Custom CSS range input styling with glowing tracks and thumb indicators.

stories.name: Full-screen Click Overlay
stories.description: Blocks UI with alert warning to click and activate the Web Audio engine.

stories.name: Step-by-step diagnostic text logs
stories.description: Prints logs guiding user on how to calibrate the array to unlock telemetry.

stories.name: Typewriter terminal printout
stories.description: Prints text character-by-character to simulate an ancient terminal.

stories.name: Blinking cursor & input box
stories.description: Console command line accepting keyboard user inputs.

stories.name: Offline TTS fallback
stories.description: Speaks text using client-side Web Speech API with low pitch and rate.

stories.name: Backend Node.js tts API route
stories.description: Dynamic backend synthesis route returning Edge-TTS audio stream.

stories.name: Pre-rendered initial audio greetings
stories.description: Initial handshakes loaded from static mp3 files for highest neural quality.

stories.name: Vercel proxy serverless function
stories.description: Post endpoint proxying queries to Gemini securely to hide API key.

stories.name: Remnant S-1954 system instructions
stories.description: System instructions making Gemini speak as a lonely digital remnant of Turing.
